145455.name: Total confirmed deaths due to COVID-19 per million people

display.entityAnnotationsMap: Sweden: Reported by date of death

145455.s_name: Johns Hopkins University CSSE COVID-19 Data – Last updated 28 January, 06:02 (London time)

source.name: Johns Hopkins University CSSE COVID-19 Data – Last updated 28 January, 06:02 (London time)
source.dataPublishedBy: COVID-19 Data Repository by the Center for Systems Science and Engineering (CSSE) at Johns Hopkins University
source.additionalInfo: Raw data on confirmed cases and deaths for all countries is sourced from the COVID-19 Data Repository by the Center for Systems Science and Engineering (CSSE) at Johns Hopkins University. Johns Hopkins University updates its figures for Sweden based on the date of report. But in the particular case of Sweden, we replace this data because the Swedish Public Health Agency doesn't report cases and deaths every day of the week, leading to time series that are very irregular and hard to interpret when plotted by date of report. Our complete COVID-19 dataset is a collection of the COVID-19 data maintained by Our World in Data. It is updated daily and includes data on confirmed cases, deaths, hospitalizations, and testing. We have created a new description of all our data sources. You find it at our GitHub repository here. There you can download all of our data.
